Summary: The Almanac is a nonprofit local news source for the Midpeninsula communities of Menlo Park, Atherton, Portola Valley, and Woodside. It provides frequent news updates online and publishes a weekly newspaper founded in 1965. The website also features past articles dating back to 1998. The Almanac is part of the Embarcadero Media Foundation, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
